commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Manual review remains for accepting the fail-closed compatibility behavior and handling normal CI/merge gates; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.; Cleared: The diff strengthens server-side package publish authorization and does not add dependency, workflow, secret, or supply-chain surface. (sha=d188894d9ab78962c8a74c7d7f14c4b6756e9f75)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds final `insertReleaseInternal` active-state rechecks for package publish actor, owner, and owner publisher, plus regression tests, a security spec note, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows publish authorization happens before parsing/scanning/hashing, while the final `insertReleaseInternal` only checks actor and owner existence before inserting rows.
commands.review_followup: Manual review remains for accepting the fail-closed compatibility behavior and handling normal CI/merge gates; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: fix: revalidate package publish owners before insert
target.body:
## Summary

Revalidates package publish authority immediately before inserting a package release.

## What changed

- Final release insert rechecks actor state.
- Final release insert rechecks owner user state.
- Final release insert rechecks owner publisher active state.
- A publish that started while valid cannot complete if the actor/owner/publisher is banned, deleted, or deactivated before the final write.

## Public behavior

Package publish rejects the final insert when the actor, requested owner, or owner publisher becomes invalid during the publish window. It does not create a package or release row under stale authority.

## Behavior proof

Live Convex runtime proof from the final package publish insert boundary:

```text
$ bunx convex run --push --typecheck=disable --codegen disable proof2281:run
- Preparing Convex functions...

✔ Convex functions ready!
{
  "actorRevoked": {
    "publish": {
      "error": "Unauthorized",
      "ok": false
    },
    "revokedPrincipal": "actor",
    "snapshot": {
      "packageInserted": false,
      "releaseCount": 0
    }
  },
  "ownerRevoked": {
    "publish": {
      "error": "Package owner is unavailable",
      "ok": false
    },
    "revokedPrincipal": "owner",
    "snapshot": {
      "packageInserted": false,
      "releaseCount": 0
    }
  },
  "publisherRevoked": {
    "publish": {
      "error": "Package owner publisher is unavailable",
      "ok": false
    },
    "revokedPrincipal": "publisher",
    "snapshot": {
      "packageInserted": false,
      "releaseCount": 0
    }
  }
}
```

This proof starts from valid publish principals, revokes one principal before the final insert, and confirms the release insert aborts without creating package/release data.

Focused regression suite:

```text
$ bun run test convex/packages.public.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       132 passed (132)
```

## Validation

```text
$ bun run ci:unit
Test Files  204 passed (204)
Tests       1988 passed (1988)
Statements  85.98%
Branches    75.17%
Functions   86.37%
Lines        89.48%
```

```text
$ bun run ci:types-build
tsc, package typechecks, clawhub-mod typecheck, Vite build, and Nitro build passed.
```

Current GitHub CI for this head also has `packages`, `types-build`, `e2e-http`, `playwright-smoke`, and `playwright-local-auth` passing. The `static` job currently stops at `bun audit` on the existing transitive `ws` advisory `GHSA-58qx-3vcg-4xpx`.
target.author: vyctorbrzezowski

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
